title: cirrus: figure out DEST_BRANCH automatically
body:
Instead of us forgetting to update it on each new branch push.


Also bump the mac machine timeout to try to avoid the timeout flakes.

```release-note
None
```

Ok I did push this to a test branch (https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/Luap99/test-cirrus-branch) here to ensure the post merge CI is also working as this is behind a different condition and it is working there too.

So this should be good to merge

I don't get it, libkrun passed in "just" 24:31 https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5892455469416448
So it is not like the test are actually that slow, it has to do something with the mac hardware that triggers these vastly different speeds... Hopefully the new pool will not have that issue.
@mheon Can you please merge? I like to see if the 60m bump helps or not
